thesis_north_star: Reliance is on the cusp of a major value unlocking cycle, driven by the monetization of its digital and retail assets and the emergence of its New Energy business as a third growth engine.

pages.title: Reliance Industries: Three Engines, One Vision
pages.key_message: Initiating with a BUY rating and a ₹1717 target price, as Reliance's twin consumer engines (Jio, Retail) approach monetization and its New Energy venture offers significant long-term optionality.

pages.title: The Story in Charts: From Oil Major to Tech-Energy Behemoth
pages.key_message: Reliance's decade-long transformation has diversified its earnings base from a pure O2C play to a consumer and green energy-focused conglomerate.

pages.title: Investment Thesis: On the Cusp of Value Unlocking
pages.key_message: Our BUY thesis is anchored on a compelling SOTP valuation, with near-term catalysts from potential listings of Jio and Retail, and the long-term value creation from the New Energy Giga Complex.

pages.title: Operating Across India's Core Growth Pillars
pages.key_message: Reliance is uniquely positioned across India's highest-growth sectors—Energy, Telecom, and Retail—benefiting from structural tailwinds in each.

pages.title: From Polyester to Pixels and Photons
pages.key_message: Reliance is India's largest conglomerate with market-leading positions in its legacy Oil-to-Chemicals (O2C) business and its new-age Digital Services (Jio) and Retail platforms.

pages.title: Consumer Platforms: The Twin Growth Engines
pages.key_message: Jio and Reliance Retail are dominant consumer platforms poised for continued market share gains and significant value unlocking through impending public listings.

pages.title: O2C & New Energy: Funding the Green Future
pages.key_message: The highly profitable and stable O2C business provides the cash flow to fund the ambitious New Energy Giga Complex, which represents the company's next major growth frontier.

pages.title: Navigating a Generational Transition
pages.key_message: A well-defined succession plan ensures leadership continuity as the next generation takes charge of new growth engines under Mukesh Ambani's strategic oversight.

pages.title: Forecasting the Triple-Engine Growth
pages.key_message: We project a 15% consolidated EBITDA CAGR over FY24-27E, driven by tariff hikes in Jio, robust store expansion in Retail, and the initial ramp-up of New Energy revenues.

pages.title: Financials: Deleveraged and Ready to Invest
pages.key_message: A deleveraged balance sheet with net-debt-to-EBITDA below 1.0x and strong operating cash flows provide ample firepower for the next capex cycle in green energy.

pages.title: Valuation: Sum-of-the-Parts Reveals Deep Value
pages.key_message: Our Sum-of-the-Parts (SOTP) valuation yields a target price of ₹1717, implying a 22% upside, with the New Energy business currently representing a significant, unpriced option.

pages.title: Scenario Analysis: Exploring the Path to ₹2,100
pages.key_message: Our bull case valuation of ₹2,100 is predicated on accelerated monetization of consumer businesses and a higher valuation for New Energy, while our bear case of ₹1,250 assumes execution delays.

pages.title: SAARTHI Scorecard: Strong on Vision and Execution
pages.key_message: Reliance scores an impressive 8.5/10, with high marks on Strategy, Adaptability, and Leadership reflecting its successful business transformation and stellar execution track record.
